personal_profile.headline: Senior Backend Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Backend engineer focused on distributed systems, platform APIs, and cloud reliability.

bullets.text: Led design of a Python microservices platform handling 150 million events per day across multi-tenant workloads.
Built a distributed job orchestration service in Go and PostgreSQL, cutting failure recovery time by 65%.
Partnered with SRE to harden AWS autoscaling and observability for critical APIs.
Shipped the REST API platform used by 40 plus internal services and major enterprise integrations.
Optimized SQL and Redis access patterns, reducing p95 latency by 48% on revenue-critical endpoints.
Mentored four backend engineers on service ownership, incident response, and deployment hygiene.
Maintained a jQuery admin UI and shipped marketing site updates for seasonal campaigns.

projects.name: Multi-Region Event Pipeline
projects.summary: Side platform project for resilient cross-region event ingestion.

bullets.text: Designed a Kafka replication pipeline with replay safeguards and regional failover testing.
Implemented landing pages and A B tests for a microsite refresh.
